author: njtuzzy
text: gloo::IoException when i used pytorch1.0 to do the distributed comptuting

author: njtuzzy
text:
hi, everyone

when i try to use the pytorch1.0 to do the distributed training(two nodes, 4 gpu), the node0 seems normal which is waiting for the node1 joining in, but on node 2, i got the following error:

terminate called after throwing an instance of 'gloo::IoException'  
what(): [/opt/conda/conda-bld/pytorch\_1544084119927/work/third\_party/gloo/gloo/transport/tcp/pair.cc:724] connect [127.0.1.1]:3210: Connection refused  
Aborted (core dumped)

is anyone know what is going on? and how to fix it?

Thanks

author: teng-li
text: [@njtuzzy](https://github.com/njtuzzy) If you do only GPU training, please use NCCL backend. If you have to use Gloo, try setting the following env variable: `export GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME=WHATEVER IN IFCONFIG (like eth0 or something`. That should work

author: njtuzzy
text: [@teng-li](https://github.com/teng-li) ， sorry for the late reply, It works and thank you very much for telling me that!
